form.formComment: Racing consistently with minor placings at his last two starts. Placed last start 2nd (Fr6) over 2100m at Ruakaka, beaten 5 m by Commander Lincoln (2:47.30) in 3yo+ on April 6 at $3.30. Before that 3rd (Fr5) over 2000m at Manawatu beaten 7 m by Baltic Star (2:29.80) on March 31 at $9.60. Will find this a lot tougher.
